talkarea.command.info:
TalkArea is a system that makes only people in a radius around you can hear you talk
You can enable or disable it with /talkarea toggle <true/false>
You can set the distance (in meters) with /talkarea distance <distance>
You can enable or disable the listen mode with /talkarea listen <true/false>
Listen mode prevent you to hear people out of the talk area (need to also have talkArea enable)
talkarea.chat.tooltip.talkarea: Message received from %s via TalkArea, distance: %s blocks
talkarea.command.toggle_forced: The TalkArea is forced on by the server, you cannot change it using commands.
